Class LogicVariable

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.LogicVariable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Sorted, Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, QuantifiableVariable, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
public final class LogicVariable extends JAbstractSortedOperator implements QuantifiableVariable
The objects of this class represent logical variables, used e.g. for quantification.
